hero.title: Solutions for your industry
hero.subtitle: We build automations tailored to how your business actually works.

moreComing.title: More industries coming...
moreComing.desc: We’re expanding into new sectors soon. Tell us about yours and we’ll tailor automations to fit.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.desc: Turn every call, DM and website visit into a full table—without keeping someone on the phone all day.
highlights: Fewer missed reservations at busy hours
Less time managing bookings, more time serving guests
Clear confirmations so people actually show up

beauty.title: Hair & Beauty
beauty.desc: Keep your chair booked out with smooth bookings, reschedules and confirmations that run in the background.
highlights: Clients book when it suits them, not when you’re free to answer
Fewer gaps in the agenda and last-minute surprises
Less admin on WhatsApp and more time with clients

clinics.title: Clinics & Health
clinics.desc: Make it easy for patients to book, confirm and remember their visits—with less phone pressure on your team.
highlights: Clear, simple booking experience for new and existing patients
Fewer forgotten appointments and late cancellations
More time for care, less time on repetitive admin

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.desc: Turn enquiries into stays with fast answers and a smoother path from “Do you have rooms?” to “See you soon”.
highlights: Guests get quick responses about availability and details
Less back-and-forth for simple questions and changes
More direct bookings, fewer opportunities lost

realEstate.title: Real Estate
realEstate.desc: Make sure every buyer and tenant is contacted, qualified and scheduled—even when your agents are in viewings.
highlights: No more promising leads lost to missed calls
Easier scheduling and rescheduling of property viewings
Agents spend more time closing deals, not chasing people

list.title: Automation catalog
list.subtitle: Explore ready-to-use flows. We tailor each automation to your stack and set up monitoring and alerts.

receptionist-in-a-box.title: Receptionist: Your agent that never sleeps
receptionist-in-a-box.tagline: Your digital assistant that never misses a call or a customer.
receptionist-in-a-box.description:
While you’re doing what matters — serving your customers, running your business or simply resting — Prozeso takes care of the rest.
Receptionist-in-a-Box turns every call, message or form into a confirmed appointment automatically.
No waiting, no paperwork and no depending on anyone.
Schedule, confirm and remind every appointment, all automatically.
receptionist-in-a-box.timeSaved:
Up to 10 hours a month less on calls, coordination and confirmation messages.
Every confirmed appointment is time you get back for what truly matters: serve better, sell more or rest more.
receptionist-in-a-box.roi:
Businesses using Receptionist-in-a-Box increase their bookings between 25% and 45% and reduce their no-show rate by up to 30%.
Every month, more customers served without hiring anyone new.
outcomes: More bookings, less effort: Customers can book even while you sleep.
Instant confirmations: Immediate response via SMS or email.
24/7 up-to-date calendar: No errors or double booking.
Automatic reminders: Reduce cancellations and no-shows.
Full integration: Compatible with Google Calendar, Cal.com and your CRM.
receptionist-in-a-box.problem:
Every time someone calls and you can’t answer, you lose money.
And when you do answer, you lose time you could use on something more valuable.
receptionist-in-a-box.solution:
Prozeso answers for you.
It picks up calls, schedules appointments and confirms in seconds—without human intervention.
You keep working or enjoying your day, while your business never stops.
receptionist-in-a-box.results:
An always-full schedule.
Happy customers.
And you, with more time and less stress.
receptionist-in-a-box.resultSummary: Impact: save ~8h/month, reduce no-shows 20–40%, and cancellations 10–20%.

faqs.question: Do I need to change my phone number?
faqs.answer: No. We can integrate your current number or forward calls easily without complications.

faqs.question: What if a customer wants to reschedule or cancel?
faqs.answer: The system sends automatic links to reschedule or cancel without you having to intervene.

faqs.question: Does it work outside business hours?
faqs.answer: Yes. Receptionist-in-a-Box works 24/7 so you don’t miss opportunities.

faqs.question: Does it integrate with my current calendar?
faqs.answer: Totally. We use Cal.com or Google Calendar to keep your calendar always in sync.

faqs.question: Can I customize the messages or tone?
faqs.answer: Yes, we adjust the communication so it sounds like your business, not a robot.

missed-call-auto-callback.title: Missed Call → Automatic Response
missed-call-auto-callback.tagline: Turn missed calls into won customers.
missed-call-auto-callback.description:
Every call you don’t answer could be an appointment, a sale or a customer that won’t come back.
With Missed Call Recovery, whenever someone calls and can’t reach you, Prozeso replies for you.
It sends an immediate message with a link to book an appointment or schedules a task so you can call back later.
No missed opportunities. No wasted time.
missed-call-auto-callback.timeSaved: Up to 5 hours a week saved by avoiding manual callbacks and follow-ups.
missed-call-auto-callback.roi:
Recover between 15% and 35% of missed calls and increase your monthly revenue without hiring more staff.
Every recovered call is a new closed-sale opportunity.
outcomes: Recover lost revenue: Turn unanswered calls into confirmed appointments.
Immediate 24/7 attention: Even when you’re busy or closed, customers get an instant response.
Automated follow-up: If the customer doesn’t respond, the system creates an automatic task for your team.
Improve your professional image: Customers always feel attended, even when you’re not available.
Compatible with Twilio, Aircall and popular CRMs.
missed-call-auto-callback.problem:
Every call you don’t answer is an opportunity that disappears.
And, in most businesses, more than 30% of incoming calls go unattended.
missed-call-auto-callback.solution:
Prozeso handles your calls when you can’t.
In seconds, it responds to the customer, offers options and lets them book without talking to anyone.
missed-call-auto-callback.results:
Customers who used to leave now come back.
A steady stream of recovered appointments and more revenue without more work.
missed-call-auto-callback.resultSummary: Impact: Gain 5 extra hours each week, recover 15–35% of missed calls, and turn lost opportunities into new sales.

faqs.question: What happens if someone calls outside business hours?
faqs.answer: The system still responds. It sends an SMS with a link to book at the next available time.

faqs.question: What if the customer doesn’t click the link?
faqs.answer: A task is automatically created so you can call them when you have a moment.

faqs.question: Can I customize the response message?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can use your own text, tone and brand signature.

faqs.question: Does it work with my current calling provider?
faqs.answer: Yes, it’s compatible with Twilio, Aircall and most VoIP platforms.

faqs.question: What if I have multiple employees or lines?
faqs.answer: The system can assign calls to different people based on rules we define with you.

appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.title: Appointment Reminders + Smart Reschedule
appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.tagline: Fewer empty slots. More confirmed appointments.
appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.description:
Forgetfulness costs money.
Every no-show or last-minute cancellation leaves a dead hour in your calendar that won’t come back.
With Appointment Reminders + Smart Reschedule, Prozeso reminds customers about every appointment and lets them reschedule with a single click.
No calls. No wasted time. No empty slots.
outcomes: Automatic SMS or email reminders: Never miss an appointment again.
One-click rescheduling: Customers pick a new time without contacting you.
Instantly updated calendar: Everything stays in sync with your calendar and CRM.
Fewer cancellations: Your schedule stays full without effort.
Better customer experience: Professional, smooth communication.
appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.problem: No-shows and last-minute cancellations don’t just empty your calendar: they break your rhythm, make you lose money and force you to improvise.
appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.solution:
Prozeso keeps in touch with your customers for you.
It sends automatic reminders and offers rescheduling without phone calls.
You keep working while your calendar reorganizes itself.
appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.results: A stable calendar, on-time customers and a business that doesn’t stop due to surprises.
appointment-reminders-smart-reschedule.resultSummary: Impact: Save up to 8 hours a month, cut no-shows by 20–40%, and reduce last-minute cancellations by 10–20%—more bookings, more revenue, less stress.

faqs.question: How far in advance are reminders sent?
faqs.answer: You decide: 24h, 48h or even the same day, according to your preferences.

faqs.question: What if a customer wants to change their appointment?
faqs.answer: They receive a direct link with your available times. They just click and the system updates everything automatically.

faqs.question: Does it work with Google Calendar or Cal.com?
faqs.answer: Yes, syncing is instant and bidirectional.

faqs.question: Can I customize the messages?
faqs.answer: Of course. You can adapt the tone, language and template to your brand.

faqs.question: What if I want to disable automatic reminders?
faqs.answer: You can do it at any time, though most businesses see great ROI from the first month.
